systems.system_notes: Antegrade and retrograde femoral intramedullary nailing platform for femoral shaft and distal femur fracture fixation.

trays.tray_notes: Official Stryker materials describe the T2 Femur A/R nailing system with dedicated targeting devices and operative technique support.

components.component_notes: Official product materials describe the femoral nail platform for antegrade or retrograde treatment of femoral shaft and distal femur fractures.
Official materials describe distal and proximal locking options and dynamic locking capability within the T2 system.
Official T2 Femur materials explicitly reference special condyle bolts for distal fixation.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public T2 Femur page defines the nail platform and fixation options but does not expose a public implant code table in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper operative technique or catalogue pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
